introSection: Shadows of Arkham is a Bolliger & Mabillard steel inverted virtual reality roller coaster located at Parque Warner Madrid, in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On 21 December 2016, Parque Warner Madrid announced that Batman: La Fuga would receive virtual reality headsets for the 2017 season. It was renamed Batman: Arkham Asylum.

In 2023, the ride was renamed to Shadows of Arkham for the opening of Batman: Gotham City Escape.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster is an example of the much copied Batman model from Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Batman: La Fuga is Spanish for Batman: The Escape.

fullText:
Shadows of Arkham is a Bolliger & Mabillard steel inverted virtual reality roller coaster located at Parque Warner Madrid, in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain.

On 21 December 2016, Parque Warner Madrid announced that Batman: La Fuga would receive virtual reality headsets for the 2017 season. It was renamed Batman: Arkham Asylum.

In 2023, the ride was renamed to Shadows of Arkham for the opening of Batman: Gotham City Escape.

This roller coaster is an example of the much copied Batman model from Bolliger & Mabillard.



Batman: La Fuga is Spanish for Batman: The Escape.
